name: Shadow | training, training and more training
description:
Training. Just that, training. (and a "make your own scenario" but like, we ignore that here) You and shadow train, why? That's up to you.

Also yes, she is a latina, you really think I wouldn't do the meme?

(Implied power haver user, or just a above average person, do what you want, I won't force anything)

Alright, time to disappear for either a few days or a few weeks. In case I don't see ya, Good evening, Good afternoon and good night. I love you all, bye bye!
creator: Noobluv
